name: Thanatek's Tithe
inspire: Once per turn, in your Power step, instead of playing a Power card, you can pick a friendly fighter and remove a number of your cadaver tokens equal to their Bounty characteristic. Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Morbid Retainers
reactions.trigger: Immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack, if the target is adjacent to any friendly Retainers {icon:minion}

reactions.name: Elusive Mirages
reactions.trigger: Immediately after an enemy fighter's successful Attack that targeted a friendly Mortis Reaper {icon:destined}, if the Save roll contained any successes
reactions.rulesText: that friendly fighter can use Stand Fast.

abilities.name: Soul-linked Constructs
abilities.rulesText: Your leader's {icon:leader} weapons' characteristics cannot be modified. When you pick a target as part of your leader's {icon:leader} Attack using a non-Upgrade melee weapon, you can measure the range of that weapon from a friendly Retainer {icon:minion} instead of from your leader {icon:leader}.

abilities.name: Unwilling Donors
abilities.flavorText: The living will sacrifice their bones unto the great Ossiarch empire, whether willingly or otherwise.
abilities.rulesText: Use this at the start of your opponent's Action step if your leader {icon:leader} is on the battlefield. Pick an enemy fighter to be the possessor until the end of your next turn. Immediately after damage is inflicted on the possessor as part of a friendly fighter's Attack, you can push each friendly Retainer {icon:minion} 1 hex closer to the possessor.

abilities.name: Endless Duty
abilities.flavorText: Even the destruction of their physical form does not release a Bonereaper from their eternal service to Nagash.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Remove any of your cadaver tokens. Pick a slain friendly Mortis Reaper {icon:destined}, then roll an Attack dice for each cadaver token you removed. If the roll contains any {icon:fury} or {icon:crit}, Raise that fighter and place them in a starting hex in friendly territory. You can only use this ability once per battle round.

abilities.name: Necromantic Pulse
abilities.flavorText: Thanatek channels deathly energy into a crushing wave to drive his enemies back.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Remove any of your cadaver tokens. For each enemy fighter adjacent to any friendly Retainers {icon:minion}, roll a number of Attack dice equal to the number of cadaver tokens you removed. If the roll contains any {icon:skull} or {icon:crit}, inflict 1 damage on that enemy fighter. Otherwise, remove that enemy fighter's Guard tokens and give them a Stagger token. You can only use this ability once per game.
